case_title: MAGAVERO GERARD VS JULIEN RICHARD JR./TRUSTEE FOR VALERIE CORVIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAGAVERO GERARD AS TO DEFENDANT JULIEN RICHARD JR./TRUSTEE FOR VALERIE CORVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JULIEN RICHARD JR./TRUSTEE FOR VALERIE CORVIN
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JULIEN RICHARD JR./TRUSTEE FOR VALERIE CORVIN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-12-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-14-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGAVERO GERARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JULIEN RICHARD JR./TRUSTEE FOR VALERIE CORVIN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROBATE HAS BEEN INITIATED IN SUPERIOR COURT AND SHOULD BE TREATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
